title: Pickup HUD
description: Displays and tracks newly picked-up items and gained experience directly on your screen (HUD). Never miss what you collect! Configurable. Pick Up.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bf92009cb1c6ba10af952db5a2e5fa345bf2cab_0.webp) ## Pickup HUD Client-side HUD notifications for picked-up items and experience, with tracked-item tools and configurable layout. Never miss what you collect! ### Features - HUD messages for items and experience pickups. - Tracked Items menu: - Search by item name or ID. - See item icon, display name, and full identifier. - Track / Untrack / Toggle / Clear actions. - Optional filtering: - Show only tracked items. - Play sound only when tracked items are picked up. - Customizable HUD appearance: - Left/right and top/bottom alignment. - X/Y offsets. - Message/background opacity and shade. - Message count, duration, spacing, and icon display options. ### Suggestions & Support **Need a specific version support? Or maybe a new feature?**
Send your issue request to [Github Issues](https://github.com/kotleni/expansion-minecraft/issues) or email me `yavarenikya@gmail.com`.
